cases.rationale: CDSI Measles D1 minAge=360d (12mo). Code line 299 fires am 12-15.
Code line 301 catch-up branch for am>=16 with mmr=0.
CDSI Measles D2 minInt=28d. Code line 303 fires am 48-72 + mmr===1.

Code line 287 sets liveVaxAllowed=false when isPregnant. MMR block (line 297) gated on liveVaxAllowed → no rec emitted. Note: BACKLOG B-1 wants this emitted with status='contraindicated' instead of silent absence.

cases.description: HIV with low CD4 (<15% in <14y): MMR contraindicated
cases.rationale: Code line 285 hivSuppressed = true when CD4 < 15 in <14y patient. liveVaxAllowed=false → no rec.

cases.description: HIV with adequate CD4 (≥15% in <14y): MMR allowed
cases.rationale: Code: hivSuppressed false when CD4 ≥ 15. liveVaxAllowed=true. MMR D2 emitted.
